prompt: I've got savings spread across a few accounts — my Marcus account earned £870 in interest, my Nationwide account about £320, and I have some NS&I income bonds that paid £410. I also won £500 on Premium Bonds. I earn £48,000 from my job. Do I need to declare all of this? I thought banks sorted out the tax automatically these days.

assertions.text: States that Premium Bond prizes are tax-free
Applies the PSA correctly (£1,000 for basic rate taxpayer at £48,000)
Calculates tax due on £600 excess interest above PSA
Explains that banks pay interest gross since 2016 (no automatic tax deduction)
Explains how HMRC collects the tax (tax code adjustment or Self Assessment)
